<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Variomedia](https://www.variomedia.de/) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/variomedia/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "variomedia"
  dnsCredentials:
    # VARIOMEDIA_API_TOKEN: API token
    apiToken: ""
    # VARIOMEDIA_HTTP_TIMEOUT: API request timeout in seconds (Default: 30)
    httpTimeout: ""
    # VARIOMEDIA_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # VARIOMEDIA_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # VARIOMEDIA_SEQUENCE_INTERVAL: Time between sequential requests in seconds (Default: 60)
    sequenceInterval: ""
    # VARIOMEDIA_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 300)
    ttl: ""
```

You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
Credentials may also be supplied directly as system environment variables, in which case `dnsCredentials` can be omitted.
